summary: A Fox News Channel segment ('The First 100 Days / Immigration Crackdown') previewing Secretary Noem's trip to El Salvador, Colombia, and Mexico, anchored by correspondent Griff Jenkins from Washington with the chyron 'NOEM TO TOUR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTED CRIMINALS.' It mixes B-roll of the CECOT mega-prison, a Noem clip from the White House, and footage of her aboard a military aircraft. This is a straight cable-news report, not a music-driven or stylized production, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: NOEM TO TOUR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTED CRIMINALS
